title: Add Wave 19 manager provider handoff regression matrix
description: Expand regression coverage for provider candidate retrieval and assignment mutations in manager flow while preserving Wave 16-18 stability.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix includes candidate list, assignment success, invalid provider, conflict, forbidden, and session-expired cases
API tests assert response contract stability for assignment mutation errors and success payloads
Wave 16-18 manager baseline remains green after Wave 19 additions
